summary: Executor integration for P1.7-4: approve on four leakage task types opens LeakageWorkflowPanel; global TaskDismissModal enforces skip-with-reason across New Seller, Leakage, and Growth; dismiss reason persisted on session and UX events; workflow completion closes modal.

interfaceChanges.description: Opens LeakageWorkflowPanel on approve for four leakage types; requestDismissTask/confirmDismissTask with reason; completeLeakageWorkflow on success.
Global skip-with-reason modal shared across copilot workflows.
Optional dismiss_reason and dismiss_note on task_dismissed events.

mappings.criterion: Approve on return_spike buyer_cancellation_cluster refund_cluster return_window_policy opens LeakageWorkflowPanel
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_executor_issue_167.test.tsx::opens leakage workflow when return_spike is approved

mappings.criterion: Other leakage types and non-leakage types keep existing behavior list_products listing workflow others feedback only
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_executor_issue_167.test.tsx::keeps no-op feedback for non-leakage executable task types

mappings.criterion: Dismiss without a selected reason is blocked UI prevents submit
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_executor_issue_167.test.tsx::blocks dismiss submit until a reason is selected

mappings.criterion: Dismiss with each of the four reason enums succeeds and records reason on session
Global dismiss modal component used by New Seller Leakage and Growth task cards
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_executor_issue_167.test.tsx::uses global dismiss modal from New Seller TaskQueue

mappings.criterion: Workflow completion sets task disposition and closes modal task no longer in active queue
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_executor_issue_167.test.tsx::workflow completion closes modal and keeps task out of active queue

mappings.criterion: Integration test approve leakage task opens workflow panel
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_executor_issue_167.test.tsx::opens leakage workflow when return_spike is approved

mappings.criterion: Integration test dismiss requires reason dismiss with false_positive removes task from active list
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_executor_issue_167.test.tsx::dismiss with false_positive removes task from active list and records reason

mappings.criterion: no API calls on approve or dismiss
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_task_card_executor.test.tsx::no API calls on approve or dismiss
